---
title: "close"
generated: true
description: "Morphological closing: [`erode`](../nitrix-morphology/erode.qmd) of [`dilate`](../nitrix-morphology/dilate.qmd) of `x`."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.morphology`](../nitrix-morphology.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.morphology._mm`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:close -->
```python
close(x: Num[Array, '... *spatial'], *, structuring_element: Optional[Num[Array, '*kspatial']] = None, size: Optional[Union[int, Sequence[int]]] = None, padding: str = 'SAME', backend: Backend = 'auto') -> Num[Array, '... *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:close -->
Morphological closing: [`erode`](../nitrix-morphology/erode.qmd) of [`dilate`](../nitrix-morphology/dilate.qmd) of `x`.

Dilation followed by erosion with the same structuring element.  Fills
small dark holes while preserving the overall shape.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:close -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `...` √ó `*spatial` | ‚Äî | Single-channel input, `(..., *spatial)`. |
| `structuring_element` | `Optional[Num[Array, '*kspatial']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Per-position offsets; shape `(*kspatial,)` matching the spatial rank of `x`. `None` selects a flat box of `size`. |
| `size` | `Optional[Union[int, Sequence[int]]]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Side length of a flat hyper-rectangular structuring element. An `int` is broadcast to all spatial dimensions. Ignored if `structuring_element` is provided. Default `3`. |
| `padding` | `str` | ‚Äî | `'SAME'` | `"SAME"` (default) or `"VALID"`, applied to both the dilation and erosion passes. |
| `backend` | `Backend` | ‚Äî | `'auto'` | `"auto"`, `"pallas-cuda"`, or `"jax"`; forwarded to both passes. |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `*spatial`. Closed array of the same shape as `x` (for `padding="SAME"`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:close -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **702.91 ms** (median, L4); up to **117.99√ó faster** than `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_CLOSE.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128],se=ball,radius=2,batch=4,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 3.29 ms / 3.35 ms | 209.19 ms | 33.55 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 0.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[128, 128, 128],se=ball,radius=2,batch=4,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 702.73 ms / 702.91 ms | 2.109 s | 8724.15 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=2,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 4.59 ms / 4.84 ms | 254.70 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 0.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=2,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.394 s / 1.395 s | 3.563 s | 16995.32 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=4,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 26.81 ms / 27.01 ms | 276.24 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | ‚Äî |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=ball,radius=4,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | oom | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=box,size=3,tier=large | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 4.50 ms / 5.05 ms | 180.45 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 3.78x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256, 256],se=box,size=3,tier=large | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.19 ms / 1.21 ms | 170.45 ms | 268.44 MB (hbm) | n/a (no oracle) | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 678.0 ¬µs / 821.3 ¬µs | 72.49 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 2.22 ms / 2.24 ms | 2.34 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 3.27x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 235.0 ¬µs / 247.4 ¬µs | 215.96 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 2.49x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 94.5 ¬µs / 99.7 ¬µs | 124.02 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 2.21 ms / 2.25 ms | 2.26 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 23.37x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 12.48 ms / 19.56 ms | 192.03 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 2.76 ms / 2.96 ms | 2.79 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.22x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 526.3 ¬µs / 537.0 ¬µs | 211.63 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.83x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 636.6 ¬µs / 644.6 ¬µs | 873.22 ms | 93.06 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[256, 256],se=disk,radius=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 2.71 ms / 2.85 ms | 3.05 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 4.26x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 221.77 ms / 236.72 ms | 454.58 ms | 739 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 12.11 ms / 13.34 ms | 12.73 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 706.1 ¬µs / 739.7 ¬µs | 242.51 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 0.12x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 6.03 ms / 6.14 ms | 836.76 ms | 336.59 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=ball,radius=2 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 12.09 ms / 12.29 ms | 12.63 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 2.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 3.97 ms / 4.93 ms | 74.77 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cpu | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 14.72 ms / 14.90 ms | 15.15 ms | 709 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 3.70x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `cupyx.scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 322.7 ¬µs / 338.7 ¬µs | 169.56 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 2.55x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 126.4 ¬µs / 141.9 ¬µs | 144.06 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| close | jax-cuda12 | shape=[64, 64, 64],se=box,size=3 | `scipy.ndimage.grey_closing` | ok | 14.91 ms / 14.93 ms | 15.02 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0√ótol | 117.99x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `5066cd0f` ¬∑ nitrix `c31df7e1`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:close -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
